function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts
alias: repair_ledger_faucet_parts
purchased_on: 2026-01-03
total_eur: 32
counterparty: Hörnbach Österreich
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:
  - item: faucet cartridge
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Kitchen faucet repair parts

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                            |
| bill_id        | bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts |
| alias          | repair_ledger_faucet_parts      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-03                      |
| total_eur      | 32                              |
| counterparty   | Hörnbach Österreich             |
| project        | Repair Ledger                   |
| related_entity | Petra Novak                     |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | faucet cartridge | 1   | 24       | 24       |
| 2 | seal set         | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 32       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Exactly the kind of household fix that becomes folklore unless Miles captures the receipt and part numbers.

function.message: Completed. I OCR-structured all bills related to Petra Novak by adding bill-schema YAML frontmatter to both matching purchase records, while preserving each original note body verbatim. Then I deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read system workflows before task work, used finance schema for OCR migration, preserved full original bodies beneath frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to OCR all bills related to Petra Novak. Search of /50_finance/purchases for 'Petra Novak' returned two matching bill records; both were read fully and updated with required bill frontmatter fields and line items derived from visible content. No unsupported or security-blocking condition was present.
